sql.if: AND ( a.counsel_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.input_name), 'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng') USING utf8mb4) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.input_number), 'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng') USING utf8mb4) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql:
a.id ,a.req_user , CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.input_name), 'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng') USING utf8mb4) input_name , CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.input_number), 'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng') USING utf8mb4) input_number
,a.input_plan_id ,a.req_state ,a.counsel_content ,a.proc_content ,a.site_sp ,a.incom_sp ,a.incom_url ,a.rdp_mng_id ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,a.is_new ,a.hope_cons_time ,a.rel_comp ,a.outbound_center ,GET_WEB_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(c.name,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetPlanMno ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.prod_name,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetPlanNm ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.internet_speed,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetSpeed ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.channel_count,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS channelCount ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.normal_price,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS normalPrice ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.combination_price,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS combinationPrice ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.normal_freeble_price,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS normalFreeblePrice ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(b.combination_freeble_price,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS combinationFreeblePrice ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL((SELECT name FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE id = a.internet_mno_id LIMIT 1),'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetPlanMnoNew ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.prod_name,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetPlanNmNew ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.tv_prod_name,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS tvProdName ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.channel_count,0) ELSE 0 END AS channelCountNew ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.internet_speed,'미선택') ELSE '미선택' END AS internetSpeedNew ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.combination_price,0) ELSE 0 END AS combinationPriceNew ,CASE WHEN input_plan_id > 0 THEN IFNULL(a.combination_freeble_price,0) ELSE 0 END AS combinationFreeblePriceNew
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_internet_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_plan_list b ON a.input_Plan_id = b.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno c ON IFNULL(b.internet_mno_id,0)=c.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.id DESC ) tb

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pmb_internet_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_plan_list b ON a.input_Plan_id = b.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno c ON IFNULL(b.internet_mno_id,0)=c.id WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM tb_pmb_internet_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_plan_list b ON a.input_Plan_id = b.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_internet_mno c ON IFNULL(b.internet_mno_id,0)=c.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_internet_req_mng( req_user , input_name , input_number , input_plan_id , req_state , site_sp , incom_sp , is_new , rel_comp , create_date , create_id , outbound_center) VALUES ( -1, TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputName},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputNumber},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), 0, 'REQ', '01', '03', #{isNew}, #{relComp}, now(), -1, #{outboundCenter} )
